tweets.text: Thank you @SecretaryWright for the great discussion at the @ARPAE Summit on the future of AI, energy, and American innovation. @AMD is proud to work with @ENERGY to strengthen U.S. leadership in AI.

Thank you @HowardLutnick for joining the Semiconductor  Industry Association Board @SIAAmerica for an important discussion on strengthening America’s leadership in semiconductors and expanding our domestic manufacturing footprint.  We deeply appreciate the open dialogue and

Honored to be nominated by @POTUS @WhiteHouse to serve on the President’s Council of Advisors on Science and Technology.  Great to join @mkratsios47 @davidsacks47 and so many distinguished leaders to advance U.S. technology leadership and strengthen our innovation ecosystem.

Honored to meet Senior Secretary @JungWooHa2 today in Seoul to discuss South Korea’s ambitious vision for sovereign AI.  @AMD is committed to partnering to grow and expand the AI ecosystem in support of Korea’s AI G3 vision.

Thank you President Chiang and the entire @LifeAtPurdue community for a great visit. Loved meeting some brilliant students and spending time talking about the future of computing and AI. https://t.co/hggeGhyZdR

Big day for @AMD and @Meta as we expand our strategic partnership to deploy 6GW of Instinct GPUs.  Excited to partner across silicon, systems and software to help Meta push the boundaries of AI at massive scale!
Happy #LunarNewYear! Wishing our friends, colleagues and the @AMD family around the world a happy, healthy and prosperous Year of the Horse. 新年快樂! https://t.co/YOXqkAD9V1
Thanks for joining us @mkratsios47 at #CES2026.  We are all in on @POTUS’ Genesis Mission and we are excited to bring the best of our technology to the mission! https://t.co/7j1ZzfD4TF

Great to kick off #CES2026 as we work with our entire ecosystem of partners to bring AI everywhere, for everyone.  We brought Helios, our rack-scale AI solution to Vegas, showcased our expanded portfolio with Instinct MI455X, MI440X for enterprise, and MI430X for supercomputing, https://t.co/v73h28jtJF

I was privileged to learn and experience the leadership of Lou Gerstner early in my career at @IBM.  He was amazingly curious and insightful about technology.   So honored to have had a chance to work with him.  My condolences are with Lou’s family and the extended @ibm family.
Wishing everyone a very Merry Christmas.  🎄
Happy Thanksgiving!  Grateful for so many things this year and especially our @AMD extended family and friends.  Wishing everyone a wonderful holiday. https://t.co/029jYrmDTd

The Genesis Mission represents a bold national effort to harness AI for scientific discovery and innovation. Thank you @POTUS @SecretaryWright for your leadership.  @AMD is proud to work with @ENERGY and our National
labs to advance U.S. technology leadership.

Capping off a very busy week at the SIA dinner.  Honored to serve as the new Chair of @SIAAmerica. Congratulations to my great friends C.C. Wei and Mark Liu as we celebrated their well-deserved Noyce Award and reflect on TSMC’s incredible impact on our industry. https://t.co/x35lN9LrrS
Thank you @POTUS and @FLOTUS for hosting an amazing evening. https://t.co/QfdMPYETmb
Proud to announce our new joint venture with @humain and @Cisco to deliver leading AI solutions with MI450 series to the Kingdom.

Great morning on @SquawkCNBC and  @Nasdaq ringing the opening bell with our @AMD team following our 2025 Financial Analyst Day.   So excited about the incredible opportunity in front of us to lead the future of AI and high-performance computing! https://t.co/lW3GbxrOVV
Proud to partner with @Cisco and @G42ai to bring leading edge AI to the UAE!

Thank you Secretary Wright for your leadership and support.  We are bringing the best of AI computing to our national labs faster than ever in support of the  President’s ambitious AI Action Plan.  We are all-in!

We are honored and proud to power the nation’s 2 newest supercomputers - Discovery and Lux.  Thanks to @SecretaryWright, @ENERGY, @ORNL - through public-private partnership we are expanding the nation’s AI computing capabilities and accelerating US AI science and research https://t.co/Lddl86CAlY
Beautiful day at the #AustinGP supporting @MercedesAMGF1 with friends and partners. https://t.co/b7Ee3KYUMq

A thing of beauty ☺️ - please meet Helios at #OCPSummit25 our new open, rack-scale AI platform built on the Open Rack Wide standard introduced by @Meta - MI450 Series Instinct GPUs, EPYC CPUs, and Pensando networking - super excited to bring Helios to market. https://t.co/UKHMDLZAZS

Exciting day today!  Thrilled to partner with @OpenAI to deploy 6GWs of AMD Instinct GPUs.  The world needs more AI compute.  Together, we’re bringing the best of both companies to accelerate the global AI infrastructure buildout.  Thanks @sama @gdb for the trust and partnership.
Congratulations to our very own @AMD CTO Mark Papermaster on his induction into the National Academy of Engineering @theNAEng.  We are so proud of you! https://t.co/Mq3OKx7qNX

Honored to join President @realDonaldTrump and other industry leaders at the White House to discuss America’s AI leadership and all we can do to accelerate our pace of innovation.  Thank you @realDonaldTrump for the incredible support of our industry. https://t.co/5M7z87lFiq

Proud to be at the White House today attending the AI Education Task Force meeting led by @FLOTUS.  @AMD is proud to expand our commitment to AI Education through new AI Learning Labs and open source courses that will give students, educators and researchers hands-on experience https://t.co/qbpMEQRj0n
Always enjoy being at the #USOpen with friends and colleagues watching some great tennis. https://t.co/D6yPX2iMtN

Congrats @sama @OpenAI on today’s launch of gpt-oss! @AMD is proud to be a Day 0 partner enabling these models to run everywhere - across cloud, edge and clients.  The power of open models is clear… and this is a big step forward.

Winning the AI Race is all about accelerating innovation, collaboration and running fast.  The Trump Administration’s AI Action Plan is an excellent blueprint.  Proud to be part of this historic moment as we bring the best of America’s technology together to win the AI race. https://t.co/uStizH98pt

After a busy few weeks on the road, great to be back home.  It was fun visiting our newest Austin lab where I got to take a peek at our Venice and MI400 series progress!  Always love spending time with our @AMD engineers! https://t.co/WLJceVPjoP
So proud to continue our deep partnership with @Xbox @XboxP3 @BondSarah_Bond to bring the next generation gaming experiences to gamers everywhere!!!!! 😀
Thanks @sama for joining me on stage today!  Always love hearing your vision for AI and the transformational work @OpenAI is doing.  So excited about our work together! https://t.co/qEJ8fLIeE2

Great day today!  Excited to unveil our next major step in AI computing alongside some of our closest partners! We introduced the Instinct MI350 series, previewed the MI400 series / Helios rack-scale AI platform, ROCm 7 and the new AMD Developer Cloud.
 
So proud to collaborate https://t.co/zMvdeT10Af

Just finished up with the team.  Excited about tomorrow.  #AdvancingAI is about collaboration, innovation and real-world impact.  Join us tomorrow at 930am PT for lots of new tech and great guests! https://t.co/ZcyyquXhTr https://t.co/0TJkUsumrR
Welcome aboard @realSharonZhou!  So happy to have you and the team joining us as we bring @AIatAMD to the world!!!

#1 in speed. #1 in AI performance. Leading energy efficiency. El Capitan and Frontier are proof of what’s possible with bold ambition and great partners.  Proud to work alongside @Livermore_Lab, @ORNL and @HPE on the world’s fastest supercomputers. https://t.co/4u26hk6xXN

It was an honor visiting @SDAIA_SA and meeting His Excellency Dr. Abdullah bin Sharaf Alghamdi, President of the Saudi Data & AI Authority (SDAIA). We look forward to deepening the collaboration between AMD and SDAIA to drive innovation in advancing Saudi Arabia’s AI ecosystem. https://t.co/hT14Um6lIz

Honored to be in Riyadh today at the US-Saudi Business Summit during @POTUS’s visit to unveil our new partnership with @humain - a $10B initiative to scale an open,  global AI infrastructure! https://t.co/prhSHgeVwx

It was wonderful to be back in the UAE and an honor to exchange ideas with HH @hhtbzayed.  Inspired by the broad and ambitious agenda and investments in the UAE and spirit of innovation and collaboration.  We look forward to continuing our partnership.
Happy Mother’s Day to all moms out there for always doing so much!  Celebrating my mom today - thanks mom for always being my best friend and my inspiration.  ❤️ https://t.co/dMbBdQkWeN
Honored to join the U.S. Senate Commerce committee today for an important discussion about winning the AI race.  Thank you @SenTedCruz and @SenatorCantwell for the dialogue. https://t.co/DkOaI0vFrk
Honored to meet Prime Minister Ishiba, and many customers, partners and @AMD employees in Tokyo last week.  We look forward to deep collaboration in the coming years! https://t.co/BrP77llqzO
Great trip last week to Taiwan visiting customers, partners and @AMD employees including a special visit to National Taiwan University.  Thanks for the very warm welcome! https://t.co/yyU009VQ24

Great visit today to @AMD’s newest offices in NJ aka our @ZTSystems team! Enjoyed spending time with this incredibly talented team - bringing world-class systems expertise and manufacturing to complete our full-stack AI solutions. https://t.co/Rr1INDpY8a
Congratulations @AIatMeta - proud to provide Day 0 support for Llama 4!
Great week with customers and partners  at our Advancing AI event in Beijing demonstrating AI PCs in action and visiting our @AMD teams in China. https://t.co/pzAKFU6C77
Happy International Women’s Day! Great talent  is so important for what we do.   This week I spent time with some of our best and brightest @AMD employees. #AccelerateAction https://t.co/xwooWK51qO

Each new architecture release is very special.  Our new @AMD Radeon RX 9000 series with RDNA4 is available on-shelf globally today!  Had fun signing a few cards for special fans… 😀 https://t.co/h8qVFvKVnK

Huge step forward for advanced chip manufacturing in the U.S.  We have seen great results as a lead customer @TSMC in Arizona and we look forward to building even more of our highest performance compute and AI chips here in America.
I’ve gotten a lot of notes from gamers excited and passionate about our new Radeon RX 9000 series… tune in tomorrrow for all the details…. ☺️
Congratulations @HowardLutnick on your confirmation as Secretary of Commerce. @AMD looks forward to partnering with you to advance American leadership in semiconductors.

Great week in Europe attending the #AIActionSummit in Paris with many leaders in the AI ecosystem. Excited to announce our partnership with @G42AI and @Core42AI to establish a AI data center in Grenoble powered by @AMD Instinct accelerators; and our new research collaboration https://t.co/rAIsdjFepo
To all our friends and family who are celebrating the #LunarNewYear, wishing everyone a wonderful holiday and a very happy, healthy and prosperous year of the Snake!   新年快樂 ! https://t.co/Nhl5yuDDcP

Congratulations President @realDonaldTrump and VP @JDVance on today's inauguration.  We are looking forward to working with you and your administration to drive long-term growth, prosperity, and technology leadership for our great nation!

Had the honor of joining our partners from @ENERGY @Livermore_Lab @NNSANews @HPE at the dedication ceremony for El Capitan, the world’s fastest supercomputer this week. Congrats to everyone involved and so proud that @AMD technology is being used to solve the world’s most

Excited to bring new Dell Pro AI PCs to market with @AMDRyzen Pro processors.  Thanks @MichaelDell @JClarkeatDell @samburd3 for the partnership and look forward to delivering great solutions together! https://t.co/apzgYgOCZC
Proud of our new @Ryzen AI PC lineup that @jackhuynh showed off at #CES2025!  Lots of new systems from all of our partners!
Happy New Year!!! Excited for all 2025 will bring!  🎊🥳
It’s been an incredible year - I’m grateful for our extended @AMD family and all we have accomplished together.  Wishing everyone a very happy, healthy and restful holiday! https://t.co/ZVYjl3GnYc
Had a great day visiting our @ZTSystems team and seeing some of the newest innovations for future AI systems in the lab! https://t.co/23IGHR97ab
Wishing everyone a very Happy Thanksgiving!!!  I’m very thankful to our amazing @AMD extended family, friends, and fans.  Looking forward to all we will do together.  ❤️ https://t.co/eo7LWnz90Z

Big day at #SC24!!  Excited to announce El Capitan, powered by @AMD is now the world's fastest supercomputer at 1.742 exaflops! We now power 5 of the top 10 and 21 of the top 50 supercomputers in the world. Thanks to @HPE, @Livermore_Lab, @ENERGY for their partnership! https://t.co/VRZFK4Gnn1
The reviews are in and our new @AMDRyzen 7 9800X3D desktop CPU is the gaming champ!  Now available globally.  Signed a few this morning for some special partners 😁 https://t.co/NNYNxREB8A
Thank you @MercedesAMGF1 @LewisHamilton and Toto Wolff for a memorable weekend at the #AustinGrandPrix for our guests. https://t.co/XBrn5ygdMC

Happy to announce with @Intel @PGelsinger the x86 advisory group to shape the future of the x86 architecture and enhance the developer and customer experience.  Thanks to our founding members - @Broadcom @DellTech @GoogleCloud @HPE @HP @Lenovo @Meta @Microsoft @Oracle @RedHat

Last week was amazing - always love launching new @AMD EPYC, Instinct, Pensando and Ryzen products with our partners, customers and developers!  Special thanks to @Microsoft, @googlecloud, @AIatMeta, @OracleCloud, @databricks, @DellTech, @HPE, @Supermicro_SMCI, @Lenovo, https://t.co/CRj9wbAjGL

Getting ready for an incredible Advancing AI event tomorrow with customers, partners, developers, press and analysts! Join us for announcements, previews and learn more about the @AMD expanding AI ecosystem.  https://t.co/nHrrEjnnbS https://t.co/utH5pkuDyf

10 years ago I had the honor of a lifetime to be named @AMD CEO.  It’s been an incredible journey with so many proud moments.  Today I want to thank the global @AMD team for all you do.  As amazing as the last 10 years have been, the best is yet to come. 🥰 https://t.co/WuQRt3xlX3
Congratulations to our very own Gamal Refai-Ahmed on your induction into the @theNAEng !  We are very proud of you! https://t.co/xGUy3ROn6G
Had a blast visiting our @AMD Markham team and celebrating the opening of our new office!  So proud of our talented Team @AMD Canada!  🇨🇦 https://t.co/wN8pXLWGBi
Honored to meet PM Modi this afternoon to discuss the important role of technology and great opportunities ahead of us to collaborate to accelerate high-performance computing and AI.
Congratulations @Benioff on a fabulous Dreamforce #DF24.  Thanks for the invite! https://t.co/shupHM0588

Great night with the #TIME100AI leaders, innovators, thinkers and shapers! Thank you @TIME for bringing us together. I am excited about what we will accomplish together using the power of AI to solve some of the world’s most important challenges. https://t.co/3btYmvReSi
Looking forward to seeing new Copilot+ PCs enabled with our @AMDRyzen AI 300 series later this year!  Thanks for the great partnership @pavandavuluri - lots more to come!
Finished up a busy week in NYC with a great evening at the US Open with friends and colleagues.  Such exciting tennis! https://t.co/oReZbaaHRR
RT @AMD: Results are in! AMD Instinct MI300X GPU performance on the LLaMA2-70B benchmark delivered exceptional real-time inferencing and ba…

Celebrating a great friend and colleague - congrats Victor Peng, on your retirement!  Thank you for all you’ve done for @AMD and our industry!  Wishing you the best on your next chapter. https://t.co/Mcb8HxFY3W

Very excited to announce we have signed an agreement to acquire leading hyperscale solutions provider @ZTSystems. Next major step in our AI strategy combining our silicon, software and ZT’s world class systems expertise to enable rapid deployment of @AMD AI solutions at scale for https://t.co/jgla2cWDdV
Huge welcome to @petersarlin and @silo_AI team!  So happy to have you join @AMD!
Enjoyed meeting our talented @AMD interns - their energy and passion are inspiring and contagious - super excited for all they will accomplish! https://t.co/FLjXz70RKu
Great spending time with the @Tesla team talking about AI, leadership and more!   Proud to partner with such an amazing team!  Thanks for the invite! https://t.co/wQKBVhnc7M

Super excited to welcome the @silo_AI team to @AMD - adding a phenomenal team of AI scientists and engineers to accelerate the adoption of AMD AI solutions and extend our open source AI software capabilities!  https://t.co/l5Gwtqscm9
Today, we celebrate International Women in Engineering Day - I’m honored to work with the incredibly talented women engineers @AMD!! #INWED24 https://t.co/YvCYuTcOCy
Always enjoy spending time at our annual @AMD fellow forum!  Congratulations to our newest fellows and senior fellows!!  The work you are doing is amazing! https://t.co/5BcDzI1ZpO

Wrapped up the week in Tainan at the Southern Semiconductor Forum  - highlight was chat with high school kids interested in semiconductors and AI!!  Thank you for a fantastic week! https://t.co/fEK1iuVbRZ
It has been a great week at #computex2024.  Enjoyed visiting our partner booths to see all the amazing platforms that are coming! https://t.co/xfKEXEthlT

Great to be @computex_Taipei launching new products across our portfolio.  Huge thanks to @Microsoft @HP @Lenovo @ASUS @StabilityAI who joined us today - Together we are building the future of high-performance computing and AI. https://t.co/OnrJ1wwyZT
Can’t wait for tomorrow!! Excited to be @COMPUTEXTAIPEI and looking forward to sharing lots of @AMDRyzen, @AMDServer #EPYC and @AMDInstinct news.  See you there! https://t.co/80LKZ7GCFl

Congratulations @Azure on the launch of the Azure AI infrastructure VM series powered by @AMD Instinct MI300X!  We are celebrating this milestone with you and appreciate your partnership, @SatyaNadella! #MSBuild

Thank you @IEEEorg for recognizing Team @AMD with the 2024 Corporate Innovation Award for our work on chiplet architecture and designs. We made a big bet 10 years ago on chiplets and so proud of all the innovation here! https://t.co/1h16gym5Fi
Enjoyed visiting @YaleSOM this week and meeting the class of 2025 MBA students.  Thanks @coastw and Ravi Dhar for the invitation! https://t.co/Y2I8zVOnZy
Amazing watching the total eclipse in Austin this afternoon with Team @AMD 😁 https://t.co/FNi2lf5RNC
Fabulous week in China with customers, partners and @AMD team! https://t.co/XsuglWN3Fj
Thank you @jimihendrixlive @JCHartzell and UT Provost Sharon Wood for a great discussion @UTAustin on the important intersection between AI and healthcare!

Had a great time today at #SXSW2024 with @RyanPatelGlobal talking about the power of AI, the future of tech and more!  Huge thanks to David Conley and @WetaFXofficial for your partnership and sharing the exciting advancements in visual effects, and congratulations again on your https://t.co/bcnwJT9y1v
Welcome to Austin @RyanPatelGlobal!  Looking forward to our conversation on Monday at #SXSW2024…. It’s going to be fun!

Happy International Women’s Day!  I’m so proud to work with all the amazing women across @AMD who together help us push the envelope on high performance and adaptive computing every day!  #IWD2024 https://t.co/Y5VTPLUvcM
Fantastic time with our Americas @AMD sales team as they kicked off the year. Congratulations to our award winners and looking forward to all we will do together in 2024! https://t.co/NwD29Wr8zG

This week marks the two year anniversary of Xilinx joining the @AMD family.  Thanks to the @AMDembedded team for the fantastic momentum.  Loved my gift 😁 - another great chip to add to my collection - the largest and most complex FPGA ever built - Versal Premium - being used now https://t.co/tVAmdiAPOT
Happy Lunar New Year!  Wishing our @AMD family and friends great health, happiness and prosperity in the Year of the Dragon! 🎉 https://t.co/h8NpRpSbNS
Really enjoyed  spending some time with @kevin_scott talking about tech, AI and much more.  Thanks for having me!

Merry Christmas to all who celebrate.  We have so much to be thankful for, wishing the entire @AMD family and all of our friends, partners, and fans a very happy, healthy and restful holiday! https://t.co/7Hli28FFSn
Had a great time this week with our best and brightest @AMD technologists - always pushing the envelope on innovation! https://t.co/nSw80cU9Nt
Thanks @MichaelDell for the strong partnership - we are excited to bring  @AMD Instinct MI300X in the PowerEdge XE9680 to the enterprise!

Amazing day advancing #AI with our launch of @AMD Instinct MI300X - the most advanced AI solution in the industry.  Huge thanks to our partners who joined us today… together we are building the future of AI. @Microsoft @OracleCloud @Meta @Dell @Supermicro_SMCI @HPE @Lenovo https://t.co/8TvCbQwCEl

Honored to accept the 2024 #IEEE Corporate Innovation Award from @IEEEAwards on behalf of @AMD for our leadership in chiplet architecture designs for high-performance and adaptive computing. So proud of Team @AMD!!  https://t.co/UI2SagdxIZ https://t.co/1rWWXlcQbf
Happy Thanksgiving to all - so thankful for so many things this year especially our wonderful @AMD’ers worldwide and all of our partners, friends, and fans. https://t.co/UZyUsMTHQQ

Exciting opening from @satyanadella at #MSIgnite! Proud of our partnership with Microsoft to bring the performance of @AMD Instinct MI300 to @Azure for generative AI workloads. https://t.co/jaQgPWQcZw

Honored to receive the @CEDupdate Distinguished Leadership Award alongside so many exceptional leaders. Thanks @JohnTChambers for the warm introduction and to the CED members for this recognition.  So privileged to lead Team @AMD at this amazing time in the semiconductor world! https://t.co/XLHdlMnUZL

It was wonderful to be at #LenovoTechWorld and join @YuanqingYang to talk about the tremendous partnership between @Lenovo and @AMD across devices, infrastructure and solutions.  Looking forward to all we will do together to enable “AI for All” in the coming years! https://t.co/VvjZkSzXyB
Gorgeous afternoon with friends and partners at the #AustinGP - congrats @MercedesAMGF1 @LewisHamilton on a great race! https://t.co/oreonGMfqX
So much fun visiting the original @HP garage and chatting with @RyanPatelGlobal about tech and more.  Thank you @EnriqueJLores for having me.

Loved attending @GlobalSemi’s annual Women in Semiconductor Hardware  Conference and meeting so many talented women.  Thank you Jodi Shelton and the WLI board for all that you do and big congrats to @Azure’s Rani Borkar for being recognized for her inspiring leadership and https://t.co/dPXrYVvs4c

Great to spend some time with the very talented @nod_dot_ai team!!  Excited to enter definitive agreements this week to acquire @nod_dot_ai to strengthen our open-source AI software ecosystem and accelerate deployment of @AMD AI solutions. https://t.co/0i7Ma3Uv6R
Loved spending time with our phenomenal team in Markham!  Thanks @AMD Canada for all the amazing innovation across our portfolio.  🤗 https://t.co/aShdqp0e8x
Love working with @LaminiAI and @realSharonZhou making LLMs easy and accessible for all on @AMD @AMDInstinct  GPUs!  So cool what can be done with @LaminiAI LLM Superstations!!

Congrats to the amazing Sota Fujii on his recent tournament win and as the youngest holder of 7 major Shogi titles.  It was great to meet Fujii-san recently in Tokyo and thrilled that he is a fan of  @AMDRyzen. https://t.co/WpIpKXABK9
Congrats @ClementDelangue!  Excited to broaden our collaboration with @huggingface to build the largest AI community!

So inspiring to spend time this morning with our interns - so much energy, enthusiasm and talent!  We are thrilled to have all of you on Team @AMD and look forward to all that you will accomplish going forward! https://t.co/G9x6ZMx3e7
Great spending time with @JoyceAMullen and the @InsightEnt team talking about the future of computing and the power of AI! https://t.co/WQIZbI2Bj6
Great to be with @bestbuy team this week.  Loved seeing the new @amd and @microsoft display in-store with all the fantastic new @ryzen PCs! https://t.co/LibNb0sKnF

Had a fantastic few days… hosting our @AMD Innovation Day with our ecosystem partners, meeting with numerous customers and partners, and catching up with great colleagues and  friends! ☺️ https://t.co/qiaypZSSvX
